description_long: This object is a tall, slender coconut palm tree with a slightly curved, grayish-brown trunk that widens at the base. The trunk is smooth and columnar, leading up to a dense crown of large, feathery fronds that radiate outward in all directions. The fronds are composed of long, narrow leaflets that are a mix of vibrant green and yellowish hues, giving the canopy a lush, tropical appearance. At the top, several coconuts are visible nestled among the fronds, their round shapes partially obscured by the foliage. The overall silhouette is elegant and iconic, typical of coconut palms found in tropical and subtropical urban landscapes. The tree stands alone, with no visible background elements to indicate its immediate environment.
description: A tall, slender coconut palm tree with a smooth, grayish trunk and a lush crown of green fronds, featuring several coconuts nestled at the top.
description_view_0: The palm tree is seen from the front, showing a full, rounded crown of fronds and a slightly curved trunk widening at the base.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the asymmetry of the fronds and the curvature of the trunk, with more fronds visible on the left.
description_view_2: The tree appears more upright, with the trunk's curve less pronounced and the fronds forming a denser canopy at the top.
description_view_3: Another side view, showing the fronds extending outward and the trunk's base clearly visible, with a slight lean to the right.
attribute_husk_pattern: The visible coconut husks are partially obscured by fronds but appear to have a rough, fibrous texture with irregular, longitudinal fibers running along the surface. The fibers are dense and create a slightly uneven, matte appearance with some variation in color from brown to tan.
attribute_stem_attachment: No distinct stem or stem scar is visible on the coconuts due to their position among the fronds.
attribute_growth_cluster: Cluster; several coconuts are visible grouped together at the top of the tree among the fronds.
attribute_proximity_to_palm_trees: The coconuts are attached directly to the crown of a palm tree, with no separation.
attribute_urban_placement: Indeterminate; the background is plain and provides no contextual clues about the environment.
